caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Impact Aruba Today
caribbean.paragraph: Aruba is experiencing moderate northeast winds sustained at 23 kt with wave heights reaching 5.6 feet and an 8-second swell period from the NE. Rain probability is 31%, indicating scattered showers, while Martinique reports lighter winds at 13 kt and less than 10% rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Dubrovnik Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing moderate southerly winds up to 16 kt with wave heights reaching 4.0 ft and a 5-second swell period. Rain probability is 69%, indicating a significant chance of precipitation affecting the port, while Marseille sees stronger winds at 23 kt but less impactful rain conditions.
